name: c10_e2_repair
description: Repair pass target: C10 — second elementary symmetric polynomial of pairwise distances. Oracle FAIL + Checker PASS candidate from Phase 2 batch 2. Baseline margin = -1.67. Goal: flip to positive margin with mixed adapter while preserving checker PASS.
notes: Single-candidate repair run. Adapter target: missing-constant + truncation bias (model prefers simpler algebraic distractors over the full quadratic symmetric polynomial). Mixed adapter from exp03_correction is the first attempt.
